entries.description: Duplicate Traefik service names across namibarden.yaml and coolify.yaml caused ALL file-provider services to fail in Traefik v3
entries.resolution: Removed duplicate coolify-realtime and coolify-terminal service+router defs from namibarden.yaml
entries.avoidance: Never define a service name in namibarden.yaml that already exists in Coolify's auto-generated coolify.yaml. Traefik v3 rejects all services when duplicates exist across file-provider files.
